settings.title: COLD BREW > HOT TAKES
settings.subtitle: Temperatures don't dictate taste. Coffee indulgence without the sugar, crash, or compromise.

settings.quote: “Loyal subscriber for 3+ years - Why? Because the brew is perfection. Love this brand, the team and most of all the brew!”
“Absolutely LOVE Wandering Bear! Not only is their coffee AMAZING but it ships quickly and if I ever have an issue, the staff takes care of me right away.”

settings.title: DRINK COFFEE,\bNOT CALORIES
settings.body:
All flavor, no sugar rush. We use just organic coffee and filtered water, so you get rich, bold taste without the empty calories.

Strong enough for long days. Smooth enough for easy mornings.

settings.title: TASTY FLAVORS,\bZERO GUILT
settings.body:
From Straight Black to fan-favorite flavors, every sip tastes indulgent - but it's still 100% coffee.

Tastes decadent, feels energizing, and behaves better than your dessert latte.

settings.title: LIVE LONGER\bAND HEALTHIER
settings.body:
According to a study of over 170,000 people, those who drank 1.5-3.5 cups of coffee per day were up to 30% less likely to die than those who didn't.

So feel good about that morning coffee...and better about your second morning coffee...and fantastic about your afternoon coffee. You're going to live forever.

settings.title: STAYS FRESH\b& POURS EASY
settings.body:
Our boxed cold brew stays fresh in the fridge for up to 30 days after opening.

Just pop the tap, pour over ice, and sip away - no blender, no mess, no drama.

settings.title: 100% HAPPINESS\bGUARANTEED
settings.body:
If you don't love it, we'll make it right. No Scrooges required.

Strong coffee, smooth service, and good vibes all around.
